title: Reviewer access/test account issue
fixes: Provide stable reviewer credentials with non-expiring password.
Document exact login steps and environment in review notes.
Add fallback account if provisioning automation fails.
evidence: Updated review notes with login walkthrough.
Credential CSV with role and notes.
Smoke test run proving successful login.

title: Metadata/listing mismatch
fixes: Align store copy and screenshots to current app behavior.
Remove claims not verifiable in the submitted build.
Regenerate release notes with feature-level changes.

title: Privacy/compliance declaration mismatch
fixes: Reconcile declared data collection with actual runtime behavior.
Update privacy policy URL and policy answers together.
Add explicit data handling notes for reviewer.
evidence: Policy answer matrix and source-of-truth mapping.
Updated privacy policy link and revision date.

title: Screen size/resolution or layout issue
fixes: Retest on small/medium/large phone and tablet profiles.
Fix clipping, safe-area, and orientation regressions.
Attach repro-proof screenshots in response notes.

title: Package/version/signing configuration issue
fixes: Correct package identifiers and versioning in Gradle and store metadata.
Validate release signing configuration and keystore alignment.
Rebuild and verify artifact identity before re-upload.
evidence: Gradle config snippet with final identifiers.

title: Apple guideline functional issue
fixes: Reproduce reviewer scenario and patch stability/flow issues.
Add deterministic repro and test steps to review notes.
Confirm fixed behavior on release candidate build.
evidence: Release notes listing corrected reviewer path.
